name: Black Forest Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 can (21 oz.) cherry pie filling, chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch round baking pans.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add eggs, milk, oil, and vanilla extract; beat on medium speed for 2 minutes.
5. Remove from the mixer and stir in boiling water (the batter will be thin).
6. Pour batter into prepared pans.
7. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow cooling for 10 minutes, then remove from pans.
9. Cool completely on wire racks.
10. Place one layer on a serving plate.
11. Spread half of the pie filling over the layer, stopping about 1/2 inch from the edge.
12. Pipe or spread whipped topping around the edge.
13. Top with the second cake layer.
14. Spread remaining pie filling over the layer, stopping about 1/2 inch from the edge.
15. Make a border around the top edge with the remaining topping.
16. Garnish with sliced almonds, if desired.
17. Refrigerate until just before serving.
